title: leonurus japonicus f. niveus
intro: Leonurus japonicus f. niveus, also known as white hedge hyssop, is a plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Leonurus japonicus f. niveus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
